case_title: YEE, KEN HAN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FLOOR CO. VS YOUNG, WING MR. DBA YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION CO.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, WING MR. DBA YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION CO. DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT WING YOUNG. DISMISSED W/ PREJUDICE AS TO YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION. PLTF GAVE INCORRECT NAME OF DEFT IN COMPLAINT AND ERROR NOT WAIVED BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY YEE, KEN HAN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FLOOR CO. AS TO DEFENDANT YOUNG, WING MR. DBA YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION CO. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-24-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEE, KEN HAN DBA SAN FRANCISCO FLOOR CO. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YOUNG, WING MR. DBA YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION CO. $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $27.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,027.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF MAR-04-2002, GRANTED
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MR. WING YOUNG, OWNER YOUNG'S CONTRUCTION CO. RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT YOUNG, WING MR. DBA YOUNG'S CONSTRUCTION CO. HEARING SET FOR MAR-04-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
